title: Lightsaber Star Wars, USB Rechargeable Lightsabers with Metal Handle, RGB 15 Colors and 4 Modes Light Sabers for Kids and Adults, Christmas Halloween Present for Kids (74cm x 2 PC Black)
features: 【UPGRADED FOUR MODES】 Monochrome switching mode (double-click the button to turn on the background music and lights, and switch to one color each time the switch is pressed). Strobe mode (the color will flash continuously after double-clicking the switch). Collision mode (color flashes twice on impact or collision). Silent mode (press the switch three times to turn off the sound and restore the sound after powering on).

【STURDY MATERIAL】The lightsaber handle is made of sandblasted aluminum alloy material, which is sturdy and durable. The sword handle is made of strong and pressure-resistant PC acrylic material, which is not easy to fold or bend and is resistant to blows.

【USB RECHARGEABLE】Use the universal USB-C interface for convenient and fast charging. The RGB lightsaber is equipped with a type-c charging cable and a built-in large-capacity rechargeable battery. The light turns red when charging and turns green when fully charged. Please use a 5V1A charging head for charging.

【15 COLORS SWITCHABLE】 Upgraded RGB ultra-bright 15 colors can be switched at will. A short press of the button turns on the lightsaber. Click the switch to switch to your preferred color. Press and hold the switch to turn off the lightsaber, which is very simple to do.

【2-IN-1 DESIGN】In order to meet the needs of adults, we specially designed a metal connector that can connect two 74cm lightsabers together, and the length can reach 150cm, allowing adults to better experience the joy of playing.
